purpose: The 9198-line global stylesheet and design system root. Defines all CSS custom properties (--bg, --surface, --border, --text/--text-secondary/--text-tertiary, status colors --color-completed/--color-in-progress/--color-pending/--color-failed/--color-claimed/--color-blocked, gradient stops, --color-accent (#9b7cf0 purple), terminal palette, editor palette, file-icon palette, --sans/--display fonts, --sidebar-width). Contains the body reset, scrollbar styling (4px webkit), and styles for nearly every dashboard surface: header bar (glass nav with gradient glow), progress bar, stats bar, task badge & details popup, agent details, permission request modal, wave pipeline, chain pipeline, agent card, log panel, empty states, timeline panel, metrics panel, dashboard layout (sidebar+content), dashboard sidebar list, queue popup, agent log popup, files-changed badge, archive/history dropdowns, clear-dashboard confirm, home view meta-dashboard, color themes, settings modal/theme picker, Claude floating panel & conversation view, commands modal, attachment UI, bottom panel (VS Code-style), logs modal, plus responsive breakpoints (≤768px, ≤600px). Imported once globally from src/ui/main.jsx.
gotchas: This file is GLOBAL — every selector applies app-wide. Do not add unscoped selectors here (e.g., .header, .panel) without prefix because they will collide with feature stylesheets.

CSS variables defined in :root here are referenced by ALL other stylesheets (git-manager.css, ide-*.css, preview-view.css). Renaming or removing a variable will break feature stylesheets that reference it without fallbacks.
Status color tokens (--color-completed, --color-in-progress, etc.) are read by JavaScript via getComputedStyle for canvas/SVG rendering — changing values here also changes JS-rendered visuals.
Z-index scale used in this file: 100=header sticky, modals/overlays use higher values up to ~1000+. No central z-index map — search before adding.
Responsive @media (max-width: 768px / 600px) breakpoints exist but only cover header/stats/wave layouts — not all components are mobile-tested.
Multiple :root override blocks for theme switching (Color Themes section starting line 4047) — adding a new variable in :root requires adding overrides in EVERY theme block.
patterns: Design tokens via CSS custom properties on :root.
Glass surfaces: rgba(255,255,255,0.04) on dark bg with subtle border rgba(255,255,255,0.08).
Section banner comments: /* ============ Section Name ============ */ for top-level navigation.
Status color naming: --color-{state} for badges/dots, paired with --color-{state}-bg for tinted backgrounds.
Gradient header glow via ::after pseudo-element with linear-gradient + filter: blur.
conventions: Class naming uses kebab-case feature prefixes (.header-*, .stat-*, .agent-card-*, .wave-*, .chain-*, .log-*, .timeline-*, .metrics-*, .home-*, .commands-modal-*, .claude-*, .bottom-panel-*).
Themes are entire :root blocks gated by [data-theme=...] attribute on root element.

related: All component .jsx files reference classes defined here
